reviews.review_msg: She's super friendly and approachable. Take the course only if there is lecture recording 'cause she mumbles a lot and you will miss out on stuff for sure. Test are fair, class assignments can be pointless sometimes. Uses iclicker. She gives really good feedback for papers and assignments. Does group exams which is weird and I'm not a fan of.

David is a delight. Lectures were interesting, funny, and informative. He consistently made himself available on Zoom, which was greatly appreciated for remote learning. He was responsive to feedback and more than fair with his expectations. I genuinely enjoyed this course both in terms of the content and the delivery.
